response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has extensive experience in software development with a strong focus on modern languages like JavaScript, TypeScript, and D, but lacks the core requirement of 5–10 years of professional C++ development on Windows. His resume shows limited exposure to C++ and no mention of SQL Server or Oracle, which are mandatory. While he has domain experience in investment practices (RIDE Capital), it does not directly align with Fixed Income or Capital Markets systems.
strengths: Strong software craftsmanship and test-driven development (TDD) experience
Exposure to investment practices and capital markets (RIDE Capital)
Proven ability to work in full-stack roles and diverse technology stacks
concerns: No significant C++ development experience on Windows (mandatory skill)
Lacks SQL Server or Oracle experience (mandatory skill)
Limited or no domain expertise in Fixed Income, Fixed Income Derivatives, or Capital Markets systems

key_factors.factor: Domain expertise in Capital Markets/Fixed Income
